subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh Truth is verily the Hidden Mystery and the Treasured Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بالحق انه لهو السر المستور و الکتاب المکنون
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @station of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
